name: Red Tomato Preserves
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the whole, ripe tomatoes in boiling water for 30 seconds to loosen the skin.
2. Remove the tomatoes from the boiling water and peel off the skin.
3. Leave the tomatoes whole.
4. Add the sugar and lemon slices (thinly sliced) to the tomatoes.
5. Cover and let stand overnight at room temperature.
6. In the morning, stir the mixture until it becomes clear and thick.
7. The preserves are ready to use once they have reached a clear, thick consistency.
